label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Wait, February's last day is usually the 28th, unless it's a leap year when it's the 29th. But 2001 isn't a leap year because leap years are divisible by 4. 2000 was a leap year, then 2004. So 2001's February had 28 days. So Jane's birthday is February 28, 2001. Today is her 16th birthday. So that means today's date is February 28, 2017 (since 2001 + 16 = 2017). Now, the question is asking for the date 10 days ago from today. So
